testcase.name: test_04_upload_with_restaurants_folder

failure.message: AssertionError: file_url should contain /api/static/restaurants/, got: /api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png assert '/api/static/restaurants/' in '/api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png' + where '/api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae593d8400>('file_url', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae593d8400> = {'file_url': '/api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png', 'filename': '72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png', 'storage': 'local', 'success': True}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uploads_images_iteration60.py:140: in test_04_upload_with_restaurants_folder assert "/api/static/restaurants/" in result.get("file_url", ""), \ E AssertionError: file_url should contain /api/static/restaurants/, got: /api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png E assert '/api/static/restaurants/' in '/api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png' E + where '/api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae593d8400>('file_url', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae593d8400> = {'file_url': '/api/static/uploads/72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png', 'filename': '72c7ccac-fa2b-4b80-a7c4-a52bd686dbb3.png', 'storage': 'local', 'success': True}.get

testcase.name: test_05_upload_with_menu_items_folder

failure.message: AssertionError: file_url should contain /api/static/menu-items/, got: /api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png assert '/api/static/menu-items/' in '/api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png' + where '/api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae591aec80>('file_url', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae591aec80> = {'file_url': '/api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png', 'filename': '6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png', 'storage': 'local', 'success': True}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uploads_images_iteration60.py:163: in test_05_upload_with_menu_items_folder assert "/api/static/menu-items/" in result.get("file_url", ""), \ E AssertionError: file_url should contain /api/static/menu-items/, got: /api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png E assert '/api/static/menu-items/' in '/api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png' E + where '/api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae591aec80>('file_url', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9ae591aec80> = {'file_url': '/api/static/uploads/6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png', 'filename': '6151b497-8712-4e57-8825-b81aa274b94b.png', 'storage': 'local', 'success': True}.get
